openrouter:google/gemini-2.5-flash.caveat: Weval sandbox export routed Gemini through OpenRouter and hit provider circuit-breaker failures on 24 prompts.

anthropic:claude-3-haiku-20240307.caveat: Retired model kept only for Weval sandbox judge-wiring workaround; deselect in sandbox picker.

publicUseNote: Use as evidence that the run-3 blueprint structure and deterministic checks worked in the sandbox. Do not cite as a full production Gemini baseline until Gemini completes all prompts through a working provider path or the caveat is disclosed.
